## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this amendment has not already been proposed
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and understand the contribution process
- [ ] This amendment supports defensive security governance, not offensive capability
- [ ] I have provided at least one authoritative reference supporting the proposed change
- [ ] I have declared any conflicts of interest
